headline: Mobile Mass Spectrometers Market by Application, Product Type & Component Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global mobile mass spectrometers market is set to grow from USD 1.68 billion in 2026 to USD 2.87 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 11.3%. This significant growth is driven by the demand for real-time, on-site chemical analysis in diverse industries such as environmental monitoring and defense. Ion sources top market components, with their pivotal role in sampling and analysis. Field-deployable platforms lead the product segment, offering portability essential for immediate results. North America

headline: Surplus Solutions, an NMS Capital Portfolio Company, Accelerates Technical Service Capabilities; Announces Partnership with DCM BioServices
summary: Surplus Solutions LLC ("Surplus Solutions"), a portfolio company of NMS Capital ("NMS"), announced today the acquisition of DCM BioServices ("DCM Bio" or the "Company"), a Frederick, Maryland-based provider of laboratory automation maintenance, repair, technical support, and integration solutions. The acquisition expands Surplus Solutions' technical service capabilities and supports the Company's continued growth in the biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and life sciences sectors. content.title: Surplus Solutions, an NMS Capital Portfolio Company, Accelerates Technical Service Capabilities; Announces Partnership with DCM BioServices
content.summary: Surplus Solutions LLC ("Surplus Solutions"), a portfolio company of NMS Capital ("NMS"), announced today the acquisition of DCM BioServices ("DCM Bio" or the "Company"), a Frederick, Maryland-based provider of laboratory automation maintenance, repair, technical support, and integration solutions. The acquisition expands Surplus Solutions' technical service capabilities and supports the Company's continued growth in the biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and life sciences sectors.
